title: perytis lamellosa
intro: Perytis lamellosa, also known as the Pearly everlasting, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Anacardiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Perytis lamellosa include treating wounds, reducing pain and inflammation, and alleviating symptoms of colds and fever. Herbal preparations of Perytis lamellosa include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water or oil.
